conditional_rules._description: [92] Wenn QTY DE6063 mit Wert 67 vorhanden, muss STS Ersatzwertbildungsverfahren (Z32) vorhanden sein

group_rules._description: Migrated from flat segment_rules: intra-SG10 conditional (F-001 fix)

MIG 2.4c §4.3: SG2 Beteiligter is mandatory (sender + receiver must be identified). Presence of NAD as trigger segment required in each SG2 instance. [enforcement downgraded to O: NAD is the group trigger — require_segment_in_group on a trigger segment is vacuous; message-level SG cardinality requires a future counting mechanism]

MIG 2.4c §4.3: SG5 Messlokalisation/Zaehlpunktbeschreibung is mandatory (at least one measuring point must be present). Presence of NAD as trigger segment required in each SG5 instance. [enforcement downgraded to O: NAD is the group trigger — require_segment_in_group on a trigger segment is vacuous; message-level SG cardinality requires a future counting mechanism]
MIG 2.4c §4.3: SG6 Messort is optional (max 5 per SG5). No cardinality check enforced here; upper-bound enforcement requires message-level counting.
